programme.title: SpaceCamp
programme.desc: The young attendees of a space camp find themselves in space for real when their shuttle is accidentally launched into orbit

programme.title: BMX Bandits
programme.desc: A gang planning a bank heist target a group of BMX enthusiasts after the latter threaten to jeopardise the heist However the cyclists secretly help the police to sabotage the gangs sinister plot

programme.title: Beethoven
programme.desc: A slobbering St Bernard becomes the center of attention for a loving family but must contend with a dog-napping veterinarian and his henchmen

programme.title: TBH 103
programme.desc: TBH 103

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S05E20
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S05E20

programme.title: Addams 217
programme.desc: Addams 217

programme.title: Love Boat 121
programme.desc: Love Boat 121

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: Replacing the ill guide Tracy brings a safari client onto a game reserve unaware that the woman has a personal vendetta to settle with the killer leopard that is known to stalk the area

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow
programme.desc: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: Return of the Tiger
programme.desc: Return of the Tiger

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Steve receives a somewhat cryptic telegram from his old flying buddy Max Donohue The implication of the message is that Max wants Steve as a business partner up in Cascade Valley Steve quickly makes the decision not to accept Maxs offer but Steve joking about it irks Billie Jo who wishes that he would take the future of their relationship more seriously Kate suggests to Steve that Max join him in Hooterville which Steve knows wouldnt work but doesnt say why Regardless without Steves knowledge Uncle Joe sends a reply telegram to Max asking him to relocate to Hooterville to join the Carson-Elliott Enterprises

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Betty Jos due date is fast approaching with everyone in Hooterville excited by another baby being born in the valley delivered by Doc Stuart Uncle Joe and his friends discuss names for the baby which they want to sound strong and presidential such as Joe Carson Elliott Sam Drucker Elliott or Newt Kiley Elliott Steve throws Betty Jo and all the Bradleys for a loop when he announces that he has made arrangements with relatives in Baltimore for Betty Jo to stay there and have the baby delivered by one of the finest gynecologists in one of the finest hospitals in the country

programme.title: TBH 205
programme.desc: TBH 205

programme.title: TBH 115
programme.desc: TBH 115

programme.title: Munsters 229
programme.desc: Munsters 229

programme.title: Munsters 210
programme.desc: Munsters 210

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Following an Elvis sighting to The Springwood Hotel a tabloid reporter finds that the phony stories that he writes come true Meanwhile an amnesiac has a terrifying dream that he committed murder before losing his memory

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A beautiful waitress marries the owner of a lumber camp and then quickly starts to realize that he is not what she really wants

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A con artist meets and weds a wealthy old widows through a dating service then murders them and takes the inheritance finally gets the date of his dreams - the very worst of them

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A troubled investigator looks into the suicide of a priest in an abandoned convent

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Ambitious first-time film director Alex Nolan is having trouble eliciting a good and believable performance out of lovely but inexperienced lead actress Leda Bedell Alex decides to use unorthodox methods to coax more credible and effective acting from Leda for the crucial final scene of the horror movie theyre working on together

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Knight 322
programme.desc: Knight 322

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack pursue an antique beehive containing vampire bees that suck the life out of their victims

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Everybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: verybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E03
programme.desc: Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden while Mr Drysdale Miss Hathaway and a stubborn mule try to stop her

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E04
programme.desc: Kate insists that Luke take dancing lessons in order to improve his social graces but she is unpleasantly surprised to learn that his teacher is an attractive young woman

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: When teenagers are turning into zombies Max and 99 go after their idol the Groovy Guru

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Thinking that a list of KAOS agents is Maxs little black book Max and his old Army buddy get dates with a couple of KAOS agents

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: When the seven lady truckers are kidnapped to drug kingpin Leonard Markers San Pepe compound BJ Fred and Hatsie Tipton and a very unlikely ally team up to rescue them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur bets an old college rival 5 bills that Ed can out-jump his horse He has second thoughts after he realizes that 5 bills equals 500

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol and Wilbur convert the barn into a temporary polling precinct so Ed wants to vote too

programme.desc: Hogans 307

programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carters adopted Korean daughter arrives-but shes not the little girl he remembers

programme.desc: Hong 114

programme.title: Hong 103
programme.desc: Hong 103

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw has invented a spray that rots wood instantly If he is not paid one million dollars he will destroy every forest in the world Inspector gadget destroys the invention

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw plans to use a flock of trained birds to steal a precious jewel

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: WKRP 110
programme.desc: WKRP 110

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: The first game of the new football season and Wood finds himself locked in a sauna with Freida

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Ava tries to discredit Harlan as an expert witness in court

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The FBI approaches Uncle Jesse to allow Boss to stay at the Duke farm since he is a key witness in an upcoming trial for one of the Souths most notorious racketeers The reason is because the mob boss has placed a huge bounty on Boss head and has hitmen all over Hazzard County who will stop at nothing to prevent him from testifying While Boss is in hiding Rosco takes over his little fat buddys administrative duties relishing the absolute authority that comes with the job

programme.title: Hercules 220
programme.desc: Hercules 220

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Augur is forced to take part in a Taelon experiment Daan and Liam try to convince Zoor that altering minds and implanting humans to make them aggressive to fight the Jaridians is not the correct path Maiya makes contact with Sandoval

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A young Morthren rebels against his people so runs away to live amongst humans and ends up becoming friends with Debi

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Ann Fisk decides to confront the Swamp Thing that he is in actuality Dr Alec Holland

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A recent storm in the swamp uncovers a car wreck from ten years agoincluding the married couples ghosts that think only hours have passed

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A wandering energy force inhabits the body of Alpha technician Anton Zoref turning him into an energy absorbing being

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Cody enlists the help of self-proclaimed preacher Gideon Poole but regrets it when he learns the truth about him

programme.title: Lonesome Dove OY 122
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove OY 122

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A cop who finds out that he has a terminal illness sets out to kill a racketeer whos been his quarry for the last year and a half

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force mixes dinner and danger at a crime czars private party Jack Wellman has arranged the deaths of four Government officials so he can fill the vacancies with men he controls

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A fake mind reader recognizes Dr Kimble To bolster TV ratings for his act he provides the police with clues designed to show his psychic prowess

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The arrival of an old friend of Victoria and Toms causes trouble in the Valley due to the mans claim on a plot of land which has been earmarked as the location of a new dam

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: In a politically turbulent Mexico full of revolutionaries Cheyenne encounters a sexy blond pickpocket singer in Rio Hondo She arrived on the stage with a local rancher who owes Cheyenne money from a cattle deal and he wants to be paid

programme.desc: Lets Go Thailand Sights and Sounds Ep 010

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: After passing a ninja master test in Japan Cole visits a war buddy in the Philippines He helps him fight men who want his buddys plantation

programme.title: Laser Mission
programme.desc: Action superstar Brandon Lee portrays rebellious government agent Michael Gold who is sent on a desperate mission to a Soviet-controlled African nation in order to uncover a top-secret laser weapons operation and destroy it

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: A Japanese gallery owner denies his violent ninja heritage until American drug traffickers kidnap his young son

programme.title: Bail Out
programme.desc: A sleazy bail bondsman thinks he has finally gotten his big break when a millionaire heiress gets busted with drug dealers If she shows up in court it could mean a million dollars to him If she doesnt he could be ruined When the deal gets too complicated he hires a playboy bounty hunter to keep an eye on his investment But who is going to keep an eye on him

programme.title: The Black Tent
programme.desc: In the African desert a British soldier romances the native chiefs daughter and helps the tribe fight off a Nazi attack

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Attack Force Z
programme.desc: During World War II a top-secret Australian attack unit penetrates Japanese lines to perform a daring rescue mission to rescue the American crew of a crashed plane

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: The Presidents Plane Is Missing
programme.desc: An American President stumbles upon a secret world-threatening crisis

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares

programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: The same woman Karen Black appears in three tales as a blackmailed teacher a tormented lover and opposite sisters

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 34 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Zach Snyder vs. Steve Jellicoe; Sergej Juskevic vs. Brandt Dewsberry.

programme.desc: Saw Boss offers a huge reward to pirates and cut-throats if they will deliver Jayce to him A pirate scratches Herc with his special ring which causes Herc to become evil and start plotting against Jayce Jayce must take the Pride to Planet Hippo

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce hears a rumour planted by Saw Boss that Audric is aboard the Edro Life ship a ship that is capable of carrying entire civilisations to new galaxies Jayce is able to get aboard the ship by steering the Pride through the thrusters energy flow

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Miles Mayhem has gotten hold of Brian the Brain a super computer that controls a nuclear sub With it he demands full control of the Panamal Canal

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Out in the New Orleans Bayou Jacques Lancaster has been using sap from the fire trees as a powerful but volatile fuel Miles Mayhem wants to use it to power VENOMs vehicles

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Super Warrior Blaster

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The Love and Struggle of Two People

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents try to convince Gadget that he can replace the King of Pianostan

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain head to an island in the Pacific Ocean where MAD plan to explode an underwater bomb

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades try to take over GoBotron by replacing the Guardian leaders with robotic ringers

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians launch an all-out effort to find and destroy Rogue-Star
